amendment_authority: user_selection option B in workflow/tqe-p5-twse-source-contract.json decision.user_selection_option_b, decided 2026-07-22
goal: Admit a point-in-time TWSE EOD history by forward accumulation: one human-initiated capture of the official free STOCK_DAY_ALL full-market daily snapshot per trading day, starting at the activation date, with the official calendar bound in the same work-unit and separate corporate-action evidence. No retrospective backfill.

daily_capture.frequency: once per trading day, human-initiated; never scheduled or automatic

request_budget.retry_policy: no automatic retry; a failed run is recorded and stops for human review

daily_capture.encoding: utf-8 (trial capture 2026-07-23: strict UTF-8 decode succeeds)
daily_capture.latest_day_semantics: The response covers exactly one trading day (all rows share one Date). The run records that date; the accumulated history is the union of all daily captures from the activation date onward.
fail_closed_rules: stop before the GET if the calendar digest is not recorded in this work-unit
stop if more than one GET would be issued in a run
stop on any non-200 response or empty body
stop if strict UTF-8 decode fails
stop if the JSON row keys differ from schema_contract.row_keys_exact
stop if the rows contain more than one distinct Date value
stop if the Date value is not a plausible trading session on or after the activation date
stop if a capture for the same Date already exists in the accumulation store (no double-counting)
never request any date before the activation date; no date parameter exists and none may be synthesized

per_run_record_format.capture_date_roc: Date value shared by all rows

calendar_binding.binding: The calendar response sha256 recorded here is bound to this work-unit; it validates expected trading sessions going forward.
calendar_binding.rollover_rule: The official calendar endpoint serves the current ROC year only. When a new calendar year begins, a fresh calendar capture (1 GET) with a new digest requires separate user approval before captures continue into that year.
calendar_binding.calendar_inference_prohibited: Sessions are validated against the official calendar only; never inferred from observed snapshot dates.

raw_retention_policy.compression: not required: the daily snapshot is ~318 KB JSON, well under the S9 audit 2 MB cap; gzip may be enabled later if size grows
raw_retention_policy.digest: sha256 of the exact stored bytes, prefixed sha256:<hex>, recorded per run in the run manifest
raw_retention_policy.attribution: 資料來源：臺灣證券交易所
raw_retention_policy.license: 政府資料開放授權條款-第1版 via data.gov.tw dataset 11549; attribution displayed in the dashboard data-source panel and recorded in every fixture manifest

normalized_accumulation.flow: raw JSON -> CP950-free UTF-8 parse -> schema validation against schema_contract -> normalized OHLCV rows appended to the local accumulation read model keyed by (date, security_code) -> per-run manifest update
normalized_accumulation.read_model: local accumulation store under the user application data directory; repository admission of normalized fixtures only after exact source and terms review per the source contract
normalized_accumulation.corporate_action_adjustment: applied per workflow/tqe-p5-adjusted-ohlcv-volume-policy.json only with the separately preapproved fixture; raw OHLCV stays unchanged
normalized_accumulation.pit_rule: each row is point-in-time stamped with its capture retrieval timestamp; no look-ahead across capture dates

cannot_claim: retrospective history before the activation date

approval.approval_note: User approved the forward-accumulation work-unit digest and set the activation start date. Digest computed with the p5_work_unit_digest canonicalization; only the status flip and this approval block are post-approval changes.
approval.digest_correction: The digest first quoted for approval (sha256:6a493dd3...) did not match the actual file content; the content was re-verified and the correct digest recomputed on 2026-07-22. Substance unchanged.
